body.title: [sprint] Rewind output contracts — define what each workflow step must flush before it may rewind
body.description:
Workstream 1 of D-rewind-as-workflow-primitive. Complete the contract table: per workflow step (/sorted, design-audit, ticketing, /sprint-ticket, advisor consult, ...), define what durable artifact it MUST flush, and where, before it may rewind. The rewind boundary is the forcing function — anything not flushed is lost — so this table is what makes the sorted->rewind->audit->rewind->ticketing->rewind->next chain safe. Known leaks to close: design-audit findings (no durable home today), advisor feedback (ephemeral today), 'what's next'. Also decompose savestate into a cheap frequent step-checkpoint vs the rare heavy session-summary.

**Affected files:** TBD — the contract table lands in the decision doc / a process doc; downstream may touch skill definitions under skills/ and savestate tooling in lab/claudecode/.
**Design rules:** docs-live-in-code, test-plan-or-why-not (process spec — 'no tests because: it is a specification artifact, enforcement is a downstream audit-check ticket').
**Scope boundary:** IN — define the contracts (the table) + the savestate split design. OUT — building the rewind-cadence driver / send-keys automation / the /bookmark + /rewind-to-base skills (those come after the table exists). MANDATORY rule to encode: /export-chat before every rewind; conversation-only rewind, never code-restore.
**Test plan:** no tests because: this is a specification deliverable (a contract table + savestate-split design). Enforcement becomes a downstream audit-check ticket once the spec is concrete.
**Completion criteria:** A contract table covers every active workflow step (step -> durable output -> location) with no remaining leaks; the savestate split (cheap step-checkpoint vs rare session-summary) is designed; the export-chat-before-rewind + conversation-only-never-code-restore rules are encoded in the spec.
body.intention: I intend that every workflow step has a defined durable output it must flush before it may rewind, so the conversation delta can be excised without losing knowledge.
